channel.title: denolib/awesome-deno Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: denolib/awesome-deno May 31st, 2021
item.description:
Modules

Utils

  • bucketsstars10 - Bundle assets and scripts in a single executable file.

item.title: denolib/awesome-deno May 29th, 2021
item.description:
Docs

Official Docs

  • Deno API Reference
    • Deno Unstable API Reference

    • Modules

    CLI utils

  • kiastars13 - Simple terminal spinners for Deno 🦕
  • terminal_imagesstars13 - A Deno module and CLI tool for displaying images in the terminal.

    • Modules

    Database

  • deno_mysqlstars201 - MySQL database driver.
  • deno_mongostars305 - MongoDB database driver.
  • redisstars295 - An experimental implementation of redis client for deno.
  • denodbstars583 - MySQL, SQLite, MariaDB, PostgreSQL and MongoDB ORM for Deno.
  • dndbstars50 - Persistent and embedable NoSQL database engine written for Deno 🦕.
  • dsddbstars3 - A dead simple persistant key-value database utilizing the JSON format.
  • dsostars83 - A simple ORM library based on mysql.
  • postgresstars382 - Driver for PostgreSQL database.
  • sql-builderstars33 - An sql query builder.
  • maxminddbstars4 - A library that enables the usage of MaxmindDB geoIP database files

    • Modules

    Frontend development

  • postcssstars33 - A tool for transforming styles with JS plugins.

    • Modules

    Frontend framework

  • aleph.jsstars2.6k - A React framework in Deno, inspired by Next.js.

    • Modules

    Logging

  • gardensstars12 - A useful logging utility for JavaScript everywhere.

    • Modules

    Mail

  • deno-smtpstars45 - A smtp mail sender for deno.

    • Modules

    Markdown

  • markedstars4 - Markdown-to-HTML converter.

    • Modules

    String utils

  • camelcasestars7 - Convert a dash/dot/underscore/space separated string to camelCase: foo-bar → fooBar.
  • deno_case_stylestars2 - String validator and formater for different case style. eg: camelCase etc.
  • deno-prettystringstars6 - Format, trim and remove extra white spaces between characters from string.
  • deno-slugifystars16 - A string slugifier for deno.
  • normalize_diacritics - Remove accents/diacritics in string.

    • Modules

    Template engine

  • deno_tiny_templatesstars4 - Template renderer for deno.
  • etastars276 - Fast, lightweight, and configurable embedded template engine.

    • Modules

    Testing

  • deno-pretty-assertstars25 - A colorful assertEqual for deno.
  • deno-puppeteerstars155 - A library which provides a high-level API to control Chromium or Chrome over the DevTools Protocol.
  • expectstars36 - Helpers for writing jest like expect tests in deno.
  • merlinstars33 - Testing and Benchmarking framework for deno 🧙‍♂️
  • pretty_benchingstars20 - A small library to make your Deno benchmarking progress and results look pretty.
  • rhumstars75 - A lightweight testing framework for Deno.
  • superdenostars77 - Super-agent driven library for testing Deno HTTP servers.
  • superoakstars40 - HTTP assertions for Oak made easy via SuperDeno.
  • tincanstars11 - A Jest-like testing library for Deno.
  • unexpectedstars354 - Extensible BDD assertion toolkit.

    • Modules

    Utils

  • bytes_formaterstars4 - Format bytes (Uint8Array, ArrayBufferView, etc) output, useful when debugging IO functions.
  • coffeestars23 - Deno Configuration - a type-safe, easy to use Deno config manager.
  • computed_typesstars202 - Joi like validators for Typescript and Deno.
  • dccstars8 - Deno Cache Clean, reloading deps when next running.
  • type-feststars8 - A collection of essential TypeScript types (port of sindresorhus/type-fest).
  • wasm-gzipstars11 - Encrypt and decrypt gzip for Deno.
  • watchstars39 - A file watcher.
  • wu-diff-jsstars12 - A diff library to compute differences between two slices using wu(the O(NP)) algorithm.

    • Modules

    Web framework

  • abcstars534 - A better Deno framework to create web application.
  • alosaurstars610 - Alosaur - Deno web framework with many decorators.
  • attainstars66 - A middleware web framework for Deno which is using http standard library inspired by express and Oak. Fast and stable with proper memory usage.
  • aquastars140 - A minimal and fast web framework for Deno.
  • deno-expressstars246 - Node Express ported to Deno.
  • denotrainstars92 - All-in-One web framework like express or fastify for Node.js with middleware support.
  • dinatrastars347 - Sinatra like light weight web app framework for deno.
  • doastars17 - A middleware framework for Deno's http serve🦕. Transplanted from Koa with ❤️
  • drashstars838 - A REST microframework for Deno's HTTP server with zero dependencies.
  • dragonstars65 - ⚡A powerful HTTP router and URL matcher for building Deno web servers with dragon 🐲.
  • microraptorstars3 - Lightweight framework for easy network routing with validation.
  • oakstars3.2k - A middleware framework for Deno's net server.
    • oak-http-proxystars6 - Proxy middleware for Deno Oak HTTP servers.
  • opinestars553 - Fast, minimalist web framework ported from ExpressJS.
    • opine-http-proxystars7 - Proxy middleware for Deno Opine HTTP servers.
  • pogostars361 - Server framework for Deno.

    • Modules

    WebSocket

  • deno-websocketstars85 - 🦕A simple WebSocket library like ws of node.js library.
  • dropperstars13 - Custom event-based WebSockets framework for building real-time apps on Deno 🦕
  • websocket_serverstars7 - A WebSocket server library.

    • Modules

    Web utils

  • compressionstars22 - Deno HTTP compression middleware.
  • djwtstars103 - Make JSON Web Tokens (JWT) on Deno based on JWT and JWS specifications.
  • forwardedstars7 - Deno port of forwarded library.
  • gentleRpcstars15 - A JSON-RPC 2.0 TypeScript library for Deno and the browser.
  • gqlstars79 - Universal GraphQL HTTP middleware.
  • graphql-tagstars5 - GraphQL schema AST from template literal.
  • natsstars36 - A Deno client for the NATS messaging system.
  • obsidianstars15 - A native GraphQL caching client and server module.
  • qsstars5 - A query string parser with nesting support.
  • routerstars22 - A high-performance basic router works anywhere.

    • Modules

    Webview

  • webviewstars784 - Deno bindings for webview, a tiny library for creating web-based desktop GUIs.

    • Modules

    XML

  • deno-xml-parserstars18 - Deno XML parser ported from segmentio/xml-parser.
  • sax-tsstars6 - SAX-style XML parser ported from sax-jsstars964.

    • Registries

  • deno.land/x/ - The official 3rd party module registry.

    • Showcases

  • AuthCompanionstars32 - A token-based user management server.

  • crux.land - A free registry service meant for hosting small ( < 10kB) single deno scripts.
  • Deno PKG - An easier way to use code from GitHub in your Deno project.

item.title: denolib/awesome-deno Jan 7th, 2021
item.description:

  • Deno Reststars23 - A Boilerplate for deno RESTful apis.
  • UsingDeno - Curated list of Web Applications & Projects using Deno 🦕.

  • garn-yamlstars0 - Read or write yaml interpolating env variables.

    • Docs

  • myCompiler.io

item.title: denolib/awesome-deno May 18th, 2020
item.description:
Modules

Utils

  • invert-kvstars2 - Invert key-value pairs in Deno.
  • onlinestars2 - Check if you're currently online in Deno.
  • qrcodestars16 - QR code image generator for Deno.
  • recursive-readdirstars6 - Recursively read directories in Deno.
  • deno-contextstars1 - Propagate deadlines, a cancellation and other request-scoped values to multiple promise. The behaviour is like Go's context.

    • Modules

    Web utils

  • upstars8 - Check if a website is up in Deno.
  • statusstars8 - HTTP codes and status utility for Deno.

    • Tools

  • dedepstars61 - Manage dependency versions.
  • packer-provisioner-denostars4 - A Packer plugin that makes it easy to build virtual machine images with Deno scripts.
  • pika Deno plugin
  • starterstars17 - Deno module starter template with GitHub Actions CI

    • Resources in Other Languages

    Chinese

  • Deno 手册stars283

    • Articles

  • From Node to Deno

item.title: denolib/awesome-deno May 14th, 2020
item.description:
Docs

Official Docs

  • Official Site
  • Deno Manual

    • Modules

    CLI utils

  • cli-spinnerstars41 - Show spinners in the terminal while running long tasks.

    • Modules

    Template engine

  • dejsstars101 - Ejs template engine for deno.

    • Modules

    Utils

  • deno-plugin-preparestars42 - A library for managing Deno native plugin dependencies.
  • msstars11 - Easily convert various time formats to milliseconds.

    • Tools

  • clonestars2 - A simple utility for the convenient clone.
  • denogetstars9 - Denoget installs executable Deno script.
  • denoinit - Denoinit generates useful files for Deno project.
  • denoversionstars5 - SemVer and git version management for Deno.
  • deno-vscodestars141 - Leverage the typedef and intellisense built into vscode using this extension.
  • uddstars105 - Update Deno dependencies: updates import statements to their latest published version.

    • Articles

  • What's Deno, and how is it different from Node.js?
  • Deno on Cloud Run

    • Resources in Other Languages

    Spanish

  • Hola Deno! . 🦕

    • Resources in Other Languages

    Indonesian

  • Berkenalan dengan Deno

  • dvm
    • justjavac/dvmstars289 - Deno Version Manager: manage multiple active Deno versions.
    • axetroy/dvmstars144 - Version manger for Deno without runtime dependencies.

  • deno-deamonstars8 - Make the Deno program run in the background.

  • Deno on AWS Lambda with Architect or SAM

item.title: denolib/awesome-deno Dec 25th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

Utils

  • deno-opnstars25 - Opens stuff like websites, files, executables. Cross-platform.
